title: Sanji Is Trapped by the Wedding
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Brûlée, Reiju, Big Mom Pirates, Luffy, Nami, Sanji as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Brûlée
dialogue.text: where are they?! wake up, brulee!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There'll be no end to this if we look for it on our own!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Diesel, have you got any idea?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as we are in physical contact with brillee,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can freely pass through the inside and outside worlds of mirrors.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I remember that Luffy and Nami were planning on heading to the castle...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I wonder if they were able to meet up with Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This place is connected to all the mirrors that exist around whole cake island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So in theory, it should be easy to instantly enter the castle as well!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've made a rather vulgar looking bento out of usual habit!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...pretty sure pudding wouldn't typically eat something like this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll eat whatever ends up being left over.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I can't possibly eat this much food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Are you going out for a walk?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just gonna step out real quick to go get some healing power from my only ray of hope in this entire world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop it, Luffy! What do you think you're doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit it! You're gonna rip your hands off if you keep doing that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do we have any other choice to get out of here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd rather lose a hand or two than die in a place like this!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 48 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
